name: Stateful Button
summary: A button component with animated loading and success states that transitions through loader spinner to checkmark.
detailedDescription: Stateful Button provides a multi-state button experience with smooth Framer Motion animations between idle, loading, and success states. The button contains three elements: a loader (animated spinner), a checkmark icon, and the button text span. On click, the component triggers a sequential animation: first, the loader expands from 0px to 20px width with scale 1, then after the onClick handler completes, the loader contracts back to 0px while the checkmark expands to 20px width. The checkmark remains visible for 2 seconds before contracting back to 0px, returning the button to its idle state. All animations use Framer Motion's useAnimate hook with layout animations for smooth size transitions. The button features a green background (green-500) with white text, rounded-full corners, and hover ring effects. The layout prop on motion.button and inner div ensures smooth size changes as elements appear/disappear. This component is ideal for form submissions, save actions, or any context where visual feedback on operation progress and completion enhances user experience.
purpose: Provide clear visual feedback during async operations
Animate through loading to success confirmation states
Enhance button interactions with polished motion
behavior: Animates loader expansion on click initiation
Executes user onClick handler during loading state
Transitions from loader to checkmark on completion
Uses layout animations for smooth size transitions
Maintains button text visibility throughout states
visualCharacteristics: Green rounded button with white text
Hover ring effect with green accent
recommendations: Suitable for performance-sensitive pages that still need polished visuals.
